title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Marines, Unknown person #5, York, Vegapunk, Unknown person #6 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll get him off this island, no matter what!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Navy's still trying to reach me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They don't realize I'm already a Rebel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess I can just do whatever I want now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy will be taking Dr. vegapunk with him on his ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mission is to see to it that they set sail safely!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy might have something up their sleeve.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stop moving! Let us out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something is going to go down on this island soon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What do you mean he's not here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's got to be in the lab some- where!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ran all over the place looking though...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you broke your hoverboats from all that running around?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't snitch! I can't pay them back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But seriously, where did Apple Gramps go?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything in the lab is transmitted to this monitor.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
